code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in xs
    if not inserted and x < y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(sorted, n)
        sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for n in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{n}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{n}"
    end
  end
  print(out)
  Ok(())
end
